'''max-W 100''', nicknamed "Max, the Janitor Droid", was a cleaning [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that worked in the [[Droidnostics Center]] at the [[Star Tours/Legends|Star Tours]] travel agency.<ref name="CGST" />

Max was a hard-working droid, although he sometimes blew out some [[Carbon dioxide/Legends|carbon dioxide]] to relax. It formerly worked at [[Matsushita Electric]] before being transferred over to Star Tours. Its nickname, "PanaRobo," was a reminder of its former career.<ref name="CGST" />

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
The background for this droid comes from a "Spot the Droid" poster displayed at the [[Tokyo Disneyland]] [[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']], which was translated at the EndorExpress.net fan site.<ref name="EE">{{EndorExpress|url=2013/05/retro-tokyo-a-look-back-at-tdls-star-tours-before-it-was-updated|text=Retro-Tokyo! A look back at TDL's Star Tours before it was updated…}}</ref> Much of the same information can be found in the ''[[Complete Guide to Star Tours]]'' pamphlet.<ref name="CGST" />

==Appearances==
*[[Star Tours (real-world)|''Star Tours'']] {{1st}} {{C|Tokyo only}}
